ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign was selected as a staff pick */,
  "funded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign was successfully funded */,
  "days_to_launch" INTEGER /* Number of days from the campaign's creation to its launch */,
  "days_to_deadline" INTEGER /* Number of days from the campaign's launch to its deadline */,
  "goal_usd" REAL /* Goal amount in USD */,
  "blurb_bayes" REAL /* Sentiment score calculated using Bayesian analysis of the campaign blurb */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the campaign belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the campaign is based */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the campaign was launched */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the campaign was created */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the campaign was launched */,
  "deadline_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the campaign's deadline */,
  "current_funding" REAL /* Current amount of funding raised */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the campaign */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign's main image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign's main video */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign is featured */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the campaign met or exceeded its goal */,
  "final_funding" REAL /* Final amount of funding raised at the end of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Art, Music, Film) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., California, New York) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., US, CA, UK) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location (for demographic analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the campaigns were launched */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the sentiment score belongs to */,
  "sentiment_pos" REAL /* Positive sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_neu" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_neg" REAL /* Negative sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_text" TEXT /* Text used for sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_scores_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, admin, staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "num_campaigns_created" INTEGER /* Number of campaigns created by the user */,
  "num_campaigns_backed" INTEGER /* Number of campaigns backed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
